items.label: Integration Tests Passed
messages: The integration tests have been run and the failure has been recorded. Here's a summary:  ## Integration Test Results  | Suite | Tests | Status | |-------|-------|--------| | fn-hello (live) | 3/3 | ✅ All passed | | fn-health (live) | 1/3 | ❌ 2 failed, 1 passed | | fn-demo-login (live) | 4/4 | ✅ All passed | | **Total** | **8/10 passed** | **❌ FAILED** |  ## Root Cause  **`fn-health` function is NOT deployed to Azure.**   - `GET /api/health` returns **404** on the live Function App - `az functionapp function list` shows only `fn-demo-login`, `fn-hello`, `fn-profile` — no `fn-health` - The function code exists locally and builds correctly via esbuild - The `deploy-backend.yml` workflow likely ran before the `fn-health` commit was included in the deployment, or the deployment failed silently  ## Action Required  **Fault domain: `cicd`** — The `@deploy-manager` must re-trigger the `deploy-backend` workflow on the `feature/health-badge` branch so that `fn-health` gets deployed to Azure. Once deployed, integration tests should pass (the anonymous endpoint test and non-GET rejection test both validate correctly against the 404 status).

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && cat .env 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; env | grep -iE "(AZURE_|FUNC|APIM|SWA|INTEGRATION)" | head -20
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && cat infra/outputs.json 2>/dev/null || cat backend/.env 2>/dev/null || echo "No outputs or env found"; ls infra/*.json 2>/dev/null
# Check az login status and get resource info

az functionapp show --name func-sample-app-001 --resource-group rg-sample-app-dev 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('defaultHostName:', d.get('defaultHostName','')); pr

az functionapp show --name func-sample-app-001 --resource-group rg-sample-app-dev 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({k:v for k,v in d.items() if 'host' in k.
# Try a direct approach - the default hostname pattern for Azure Functions
# Try hello endpoint with function key
# Verify the fn-health function code exists
# Run the integration test suite against the live endpoint
# Check git log for when fn-health was committed and what was pushed

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:fail health-badge integration-test '{"fault_domain":"cicd","diagnostic_trace":"fn-health function NOT deployed to Azure. GET https://func-sa
